# TRN — Social transmission / sharing

Genus: **Transmissio**

Whether the video is socially transferable.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H048 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h048-save-ctas-work | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Save CTAs work best on reference content. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H049 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h049-send-ctas-work | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Send CTAs work best on identity/social content. | SND | M-SVT |
| H050 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h050-comment-ctas-work | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Comment CTAs work best when the answer reveals segmentation. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H051 | *Transmissio serialis* var. h051-follow-ctas-unless | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Follow CTAs are weak unless the series promise is clear. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H054 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h054-mild-controversy-increases | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Mild controversy increases comments but may reduce saves. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H056 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h056-recipient-ctas-beat | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Specific-recipient CTAs beat generic share CTAs. | SND | M-SVT |
| H119 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h119-send-ctas-work | CTA behaviour design | Send CTAs work only when the recipient is obvious. | SND | M-SVT |
| H124 | *Transmissio socialis* var. h124-clear-recipient-category | Weak ties | Videos with a clear recipient category get more shares than videos with generic share value. | SND | M-SVT |
| H126 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h126-send-someone-works | Weak ties | Send this to someone who works best when the recipient is socially obvious. | SND | M-SVT |
| H131 | *Transmissio storyformis* var. h131-observable-before-after | Diffusion adoptability | Observable before/after benefits increase shares. | SND | M-SVT |
| H133 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h133-expert-facing-generate | Opinion leaders | Expert-facing videos generate fewer views but higher-quality shares and follows. | SND | M-SVT |
| H136 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h136-neutral-educational-gets | Emotional arousal | Neutral educational content gets saves, while emotionally framed educational content gets saves and shares. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H183 | *Transmissio socialis* var. h183-comedy-becomes-shareable | Skit / comedy | Comedy becomes more shareable when the target identity is obvious. | SND | M-SVT |
| H197 | *Transmissio facialis* var. h197-facecam-reaction-increases | Gaming clip | Facecam/reaction increases shareability when emotional reaction is stronger than the gameplay itself. | SND | M-SVT |
| H298 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h298-send-ctas-beat | Sends / shares | Send CTAs beat generic share CTAs when they name a specific recipient. | SND | M-SVT |
| H299 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h299-identity-recognition-send | Sends / shares | Identity-recognition videos send better than purely informational videos in community niches. | SND | M-SVT |
| H300 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h300-warning-frame-increases | Sends / shares | A warning frame increases sends when the recipient can make the same mistake. | SND | M-SVT |
| H330 | *Transmissio facialis* var. h330-emotional-face-reactions | Face | Emotional face reactions improve shares when the emotional reaction is the content's social value. | SND | M-SVT |
| H343 | *Transmissio serialis* var. h343-should-match-natural | CTA | CTA should match the content's natural action: save for utility, send for social relevance, comment for choice, follow for series. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H425 | *Transmissio actionalis* var. h425-insight-produce-separate | Repurposing | The same insight can produce separate save, send and comment variants. | SAV | M-SVT |
